description_cn: 固定位置不发生移动的点。可以将指定的锚点固定要指定位置（目标点）上去。下图实例中是将矩形网格平面的四个角点设为锚点。﻿
description_en: An anchor point is a point that remains fixed in its position and does not move. You can fix a specified anchor point to a specified location (target point). In the example below, the four corner points of a rectangular grid plane are set as anchor points.

parameters.name: T
parameters.desc_cn: 将锚点拉到的位置。如果为空，将使用初始位置。
parameters.desc_en: Location to pull the anchor to. If left empty, the initial location will be used.

author: Kangaroo Team
